Title: Trump threatens Iran with escalation, including strikes on civilian and nuclear infrastructure
Description: After two weeks of strikes on Iran that yielded no progress, US President Donald Trump raised the possibility of targeting uranium enrichment sites beneath the Kolang mountain in central Iran.

France records nearly 6,000 additional deaths during late June heatwave
Description: France's public health agency recorded an 'excess mortality' of 5,764 deaths between June 17 and July 2. While this figure remains below the excess deaths during the 2003 heatwave, researchers said it marks a 'turning point.'

Title: Fire ravages forest in southwestern France as thousands evacuated
Description: Thousands have been evacuated from a town in Gironde in southwestern France after a fast-moving fire broke out on Wednesday.

Title: ''No kids' policies promote a polarized and reductive vision of society'
Description: As child-free spaces continue to grow rapidly, a group of non-profit leaders, researchers and artists argue for Le Monde that the youngest members of society should not be seen as a nuisance to be tolerated, but as a valuable presence to be welcomed.

Title: How Bernard Arnault works to keep his media outlets in line
Description: 'Bernard Arnault's Empire' (4/6). Since the 1990s, the CEO of LVMH has built a small media galaxy in print and radio, which he uses to convey his ideas and tastes, but also to promote his brands.

How social media bans for young users, now in effect in France, have spread worldwide
Description: France has decided to ban those under 15 from major platforms such as Instagram and TikTok. The country is following a global trend that has gained momentum in recent years.

Title: Climate scientists aren't surprised by summer's record heat: 'We've entered a dangerous zone'
Description: Record heat, historic drought and sweeping wildfires have marked France's 2026 summer. Yet climate scientists mostly see global warming's expected effects playing out. Only the rapid succession of heatwaves has caught them off guard.

Title: 20 men, a 'sperm party,' and two days of sexual torment: The brutality of the 'libertine' rapes case
Description: Over the course of a long weekend, one of Christophe B.'s former partners was forced to endure sexual assaults by numerous men at their home. Some of these assaults were broadcast live on the swinging website Wyylde.
